articles.title: ‘$100 Price Target For Solana (SOL),’ Projects Crypto Influencer
articles.description: The decline in key network metrics of Solana may present an investment opportunity. A crypto influencer recently projected a $100 target for SOL, which would mark a 410% hike. articles.description: Background Solana Mobile, a subsidiary of Solana Labs, entered the smartphone market with its crypto phone, the “Saga,” in April 2023. A crypto phone is a specialized smartphone designed with enhanced security features to facilitate secure communications and transactions in the world of cryptocurrencies and blockchain technology. articles.title: Ripple acquires Fortress Trust, expands license portfolio in the US
articles.description: Fortress holds a Nevada Trust license for asset custody. Ripple holds more than 30 licenses across the United States.
